name: Grand Prize Winning Maple Walnut Mousse Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until lemon-colored.
2. Add salt and maple syrup to the yolks. Cook over a double boiler until the yolk mixture thickens.
3. Cool the thickened yolk mixture.
4. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
5. Combine the cooled yolk mixture, 2/3 of the Kool Whip, and beaten egg whites using a folding motion.
6. Gently fold in 3/4 cup of chopped walnut meat.
7. Pour the mousse into the prepared pie shell.
8. Cover with the remaining whipped topping (Kool Whip).
9. Sprinkle the remaining chopped walnuts and chocolate shavings over the top.
10. Refrigerate for a minimum of four hours before serving.
